title: Manifold launches Agent OS for governed life-sciences AI workflows
friendlyTitle: Manifold is building safer AI agents for medical research data
summary: Manifold announced Agent OS deployments with Foundation Medicine and the University of Virginia Comprehensive Cancer Center. The platform is aimed at secure, auditable agentic workflows across genomic, clinical, and real-world biomedical data.
friendlySummary: Manifold announced a platform for AI agents in life-sciences work. It is designed to help researchers use complex medical and genomic data while keeping controls and audit logs in place.
whyItMatters: Life sciences has many workflows where speed matters but governance cannot be optional. Manifold’s approach shows how agent platforms are being packaged for regulated domains where data access, review, and audit trails are as important as the model.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could help researchers get answers faster without losing important safety and compliance checks.
